CompScience Support

Everything your safety team needs - guides, resources, and answers to common questions about the CompScience platform.

Browse FAQ Download Resources
Frequently Asked Questions
Quick answers to common questions about the CompScience platform.
How does CompScience analyze workplace safety? ▾
CompScience uses existing camera infrastructure and AI-powered computer vision to automatically detect safety risks in real time - things like near-miss events, ergonomic hazards, and PPE compliance - without requiring additional hardware installation.
What camera systems are supported? ▾
CompScience works with most standard IP camera systems and NVRs. We support RTSP streams from a wide range of manufacturers including Axis, Hikvision, Dahua, and many others. Our team will assess compatibility during onboarding.
How is footage handled? Is video stored? ▾
CompScience processes video streams on-site or in a secure cloud environment. Only short clips around detected events are retained for review - raw footage is not stored. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, and we operate in compliance with applicable privacy regulations.
How long does onboarding take? ▾
Most customers are fully operational within 2-4 weeks of signing. This includes camera compatibility assessment, VMS configuration, AI model tuning for your environment, and training for your safety team.
How do I submit a support request? ▾
You can reach our Customer Success Engineering team by emailing cse@compscience.support. We aim to respond within one business day. For urgent issues, contact your dedicated CSE directly.
